title: Sort List
notes: The timing ratio between 1k and 10k is ~19x, and between 10k and 100k is ~13.7x, which fits an O(N log N) growth rate well. Memory consumption remains strictly flat around 0.28 KB for large inputs as our bottom-up merge sort operates completely in-place, thus confirming the empirical O(1) space complexity requested by the problem follow-up.
